## Scope

- [ ] bugfix
- [ ] stability/reproducibility
- [ ] tests/CI
- [ ] docs
- [ ] next-major (out-of-scope for current frozen line)

## Scope Freeze Check

- [ ] This PR does **not** add new user-facing surface in the frozen release line
- [ ] If this is next-major, it is clearly marked and targeted to the next milestone

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff`
- [ ] `black --check`
- [ ] `pytest`

## Docs

- [ ] Updated docs/release notes if behavior changed
